wordpress.name: WordPress Admin Bypass Fix
wordpress.description: Fix untuk bypass admin login pada WordPress versi tertentu
commands: if [ -f wp-config.php ]; then echo '[FIX] wp-config.php found'; else echo '[FIX] wp-config.php not found'; fi
wordpress.payload_content:
<?php // Security patch for WordPress admin bypass
define('FORCE_SSL_ADMIN', true);
add_filter('login_errors', function() { return 'Invalid login credentials.'; });

wordpress.name: WordPress SQL Injection Fix
wordpress.description: Fix untuk SQL Injection pada WordPress

wordpress.name: WordPress XSS Protection
wordpress.description: Fix untuk Cross-Site Scripting pada WordPress

joomla.name: Joomla Remote Code Execution Fix
joomla.description: Fix untuk RCE pada Joomla versi 4.x dan 5.x
commands: if [ -f configuration.php ]; then echo '[FIX] configuration.php found'; else echo '[FIX] configuration.php not found'; fi
joomla.payload_content:
<?php // Joomla RCE fix
ini_set('display_errors', 0);
file_put_contents('configuration.php', str_replace('$config', '// Fixed', file_get_contents('configuration.php')));

joomla.name: Joomla Information Disclosure Fix
joomla.description: Fix untuk Information Disclosure pada Joomla
joomla.payload_content:
# Joomla Info Disclosure fix
<Files configuration.php>
Order Deny,Allow
Deny from all
</Files>

drupal.name: Drupal SQL Injection Fix
drupal.description: Fix untuk SQL Injection pada Drupal 10
commands: if [ -f sites/default/settings.php ]; then echo '[FIX] settings.php found'; else echo '[FIX] settings.php not found'; fi

drupal.name: Drupal File Upload Fix
drupal.description: Fix untuk File Upload Bypass pada Drupal
